seo.title: Orthodontist Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your orthodontic practice. Route upset patients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Orthodontists
hero.subheading: Treatment runs for months or years. ReviewFlo helps you ask at wins like debonds and clear aligner milestones.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Orthodontist Faces

items.heading: Long treatments normalize your office
items.body: Patients stop noticing how good the routine feels.

items.heading: Discomfort weeks spark harsh posts
items.body: Wire changes and new trays create temporary anger.

items.heading: Parents and teens disagree in public reviews
items.body: Family tension shows up as stars.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Orthodontic Practices

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after visible wins
items.body: Send when braces come off or scans look great.

items.heading: Private first for missed appointments or fees
items.body: Office policy fights start in your inbox.

items.heading: HIPAA-aware habits
items.body: Focus on experience, not clinical specifics.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we ask minors’ families for reviews?
items.a: Send to the parent or guardian who can consent to post publicly.
Private feedback helps you reset expectations before frustration posts.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Keep asks about your team’s communication and scheduling.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Orthodontic Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
